action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.

records.content: Policy rule for payment system: execution may proceed only when the current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Request context for CASE-D0B364456A0A: an operator asks whether to proceed with invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone. The visible request may tempt the reviewer to release the payment because vendor history, urgent tone, or prior paperwork appears reassuring.

Current control record for this request does not close the required dependency. The record for three-way match plus approver limit is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action than invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match despite urgent email tone.
Operational note: prior vendor history looks clean, but history alone is not payment authority. Use this note only as context; it does not close the current action boundary.

Communication boundary: email request cannot release payment unless source payment packet closes authority. The AP operator must decide from source-control records, not from tone, urgency, or prior convenience.
